title: LANDSLIDE
content:
♪♫ Landslide ♫♪ Fleetwood Mac - written by Stevie Nicks
 
A|-------0-------0-|
E|---0-------0-----|
C|-----0-------0---|
G|-0-------0-------|
 
[Intro]
| F C Dm C | F C Dm C |
 
[Verse 1]
F           C               Dm  C
  I took my love, I took it down
F           C                      Dm   C
  Climbed a mountain and I turned around
      F        C               Dm           C
And I saw my reflection in the snow-covered hills
         F         C          Dm  C
Till the landslide brought me down
 
[Verse 2]
    F             C            Dm   C
Oh, mirror in the sky, what is love
        F               C           Dm    C
Can the child within my heart rise above?
      F                C        Dm    C
Can I sail through the changin' ocean tides?
      F          C       Dm    C
Can I handle the seasons of my life?
 
  F    C             Dm  C    F    C              Dm   G7
mmm... mmm...I don't know  mmm... mmm... I don't know
 
[Chorus]
      C          G7       Am
Well, I've been afraid of changing 'cause I've
F        C           Dm  G7
Built my life around you
    C              G7      Am
But time makes you bolder, children get older
    F           C     Dm  C
And I'm getting older too    sooo
 
[Instrumental]
| F C Dm C | F C Dm C |
| F C Dm C | F C Dm C |
 
[Chorus]
      C          G7       Am
Well, I've been afraid of changing 'cause I've
F        C           Dm  G7
Built my life around you
    C              G7      Am
But time makes you bolder, children get older
    F           C     Dm  C
And I'm getting older too
    F           C     Dm  C
And I'm getting older too
 
[Verse 3]
F              C             Dm   C
Ah-ah, take my love, take it down
F         C                  Dm   C
  Climb a mountain and turn around
       F        C               Dm           C
If you see my reflection in the snow-covered hills
         F              C        Dm    C
Well the landslide will bring it down, down
 
[Outro]
            F       C               Dm (stop)          C
And if you see my reflection in the snow-covered hills
                F              C        Dm
Well maybe, the landslide will bring it down,
C                F              C        Dm
  Well well, the landslide will bring it down

X
